title: LocalAgentExecution
description: Operation contract for a local AI agent execution (e.g. agent-machine running a local model via llama.cpp or ollama). Every execution must have a prior PolicyGateRecord. Execution without a policy gate is a conformance violation. Output artifacts must be referenced and must not create hidden workspace side effects.

taskId.description: OperationTask this execution is assigned to.

agentId.description: Identifier of the agent implementation (e.g. agent-machine, sourceos-devtools-agent).

model.description: Local model identifier (e.g. llama3:8b, mistral:7b). Must be a locally available model; remote model fetches require an explicit network policy gate.

promptRef.description: Content-addressable reference to the input prompt. Prompts containing secrets must be stored encrypted.

contextRefs.description: Content-addressable references to context documents provided to the agent.

outputRef.description: Content-addressable reference to the agent output artifact.

sideEffects.description: Declared side effects of this execution. Hidden side effects are a conformance violation.

policyGateId.description: PolicyGateRecord that admitted this execution. This field is required: agent execution without a prior policy gate record is a conformance violation.
